columns_wp.rp_hMpc: projected separation r_p in h^-1 Mpc
columns_wp.wp_hMpc: projected correlation function w_p in h^-1 Mpc

columns_ds.R_hMpc: projected radius R in h^-1 Mpc

data_source: Leauthaud+2012 Figure 6 panel j (DeltaSigma, PHOTO_z2, 10.65<log10M*<10.88); wp(rp) NOT available -- paper uses w(theta)
extraction_method: digitize from Figure 6 panel j of arXiv:1104.0928 (no machine-readable tables exist)
triple_check: R values in Table A2 match the labelled radial bins
DeltaSigma units: check paper states h Msun/pc^2 or Msun h/pc^2
wp units: h^-1 Mpc (standard PRIMUS/DEEP2 convention)
cross-check at least 3 values against Figure 2 of Leauthaud+2012
verify z_eff=0.66 matches the PHOTO_z2 bin definition in their Table 1
notes: WMAP5 cosmology. Joint wp+DeltaSigma fit. Table 1 PHOTO_z2 column. Fixed params: log10m_star_thresh=10.6, alpha_sat=1.0.
